offer: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient vehicle maintenance scheduling causes increased downtime. We provide automated maintenance scheduling instead of manual tracking and scheduling via spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Join community forums for logistics tools sharing
try_it: Let users try vehicle data logging and maintenance scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
